description: Notarize-only record of HMRC's late-submission/late-payment verdict from the penalties API (GET /organisations/vat/{vrn}/penalties) — the out-of-band timeliness adjudication. This is the INVERSE of the employment-FCRA engine-preventive clock: FCRA makes the wait preventive on AGLedger's side; here HMRC's clock is the SoR's, so the recipe binds the timing as a signed fact (the obligation dueDate vs the filing receipt's processingDate) and HOLDS HMRC's penalty as the SoR's word. Points-based model (FA 2021): one point per late return until the threshold (annual 2 / quarterly 4 / monthly 5), then a 200-pound penalty. AGLedger does not compute or predict the penalty; it notarizes what HMRC reported.

periodKey.description: HMRC period key the penalty (if any) relates to.

filingReceiptRef.description: recordId of the vat-filing-receipt-v1 whose timeliness this observes (chain lineage).

penaltyCategory.description: HMRC's penalty category. none = filed on time / no penalty reported.

pointsAccrued.description: Late-submission points accrued (FA 2021 points model). Present for late-submission.

penaltyAmount.description: Penalty amount HMRC assessed (e.g. 200 at threshold), in pounds. Present for late-submission.
